title: Zero2Neuro: a No-Code Deep Neural Network Toolbox for Constructing, Training, and Evaluating Deep Neural Network Models
description: Zero2Neuro is a no-code toolbox for constructing, training and evaluating Deep Neural Network (DNN) models for a wide range of modeling problems. This package provides easy-to-use solutions for loading data in a variety of formats, creating DNN models from flexible schemata (fully-connected networks, convolutional neural networks, and U-Nets), and a standard training and evaluation engine with support for Weights and Biases reporting.
notes: Copyright (2026). Andrew H. Fagg, Luke Sewell, Shayan Shafaei, and Mel Wilson Reyes
